findings_accepted: The live Stage-3 cascade diverged from the countersigned cascade by replacing QUADPROG_RAW as primary with QUADPROG_SQRT.
The live implementation replaced the countersigned T = diag(t) transformation with S = diag(sqrt(t)).
The live implementation introduced PIQP_P2 as a fallback optimizer despite the preserved prohibition against an alternate optimizer or fallback solver.
No preserved adjudication artifact, artifact hash, countersign, amendment, or formal supersession authorizing the live cascade was found.
Commit 7bcb4eb and the code comment FALLBACK (adjudicated) assert an authorization but do not preserve or bind the required ruling.
The evidence manifests bind implementation code and solver-path commits but bind no adjudication, ruling, countersign, supersession, or governing decision hash.
The cascade constituted the qualifying population through the QUADPROG_SQRT and PIQP_P2 overlap predicate rather than merely solving a population fixed independently of the cascade.
The governance nonconformance therefore propagates to all artifacts whose subject, denominator, lineage, scope, or conclusion depends on membership in the cascade-defined population.
The record appropriately distinguishes failure to preserve the required adjudication from proof that no informal owner direction ever occurred.
quarantined_scope: population-selection predicate based on the QUADPROG_SQRT and PIQP_P2 qualifying overlap
feasibility census and all associated numerators, denominators, classifications, and conclusions
every report, table, certificate, or summary whose scope depends on the cascade-defined population

explicitly_suspended.reason: It binds QUADPROG_SQRT to PIQP_P2 as the final cascade and marks Stage-3 cascade coverage PASS, which would ratify the unpreserved cascade change inside the closing implementation instrument.
prohibited_representations: countersigned authorization of the live cascade

rejected_dispositions.name: ADJUDICATE_THEN_REPLAY
rejected_dispositions.reason: Bit-identical replay would prove reproducibility of a result already known. It would not restore the missing pre-result governance commitment.

rejected_dispositions.name: RERUN_UNDER_OBSOLETE_COUNTERSIGNED_CASCADE
rejected_dispositions.reason: Surviving paperwork does not justify rerunning under a formulation displaced because of a material numerical defect. Formally cleaner but substantively weaker evidence is not acceptable.

directed_disposition.description: Clean rerun under a new prospective implementation adjudication.
conditions: The successor cascade must be selected and mathematically defined before any successor evidence run.
The successor adjudication must not use the quarantined AMENDED PASS performance result as its basis for accepting the cascade.
The already-known quarantined result must be disclosed explicitly.
The cascade must be justified using numerical-method evidence independent of the quarantined performance result.

The exact primary formulation, fallback formulation and optimizer if any, qualifying-population rule, triggers, warning policy, original-coordinate checks, audit fields, code hashes, configuration hashes, solver versions, runtime image, and blindness state must be bound directly.
Any necessary supersession of the Stage-3 Equivalent-Formulation Retry countersign must be explicit.
All affected samples, population construction, census, adjudications, lineage, and final implementation evidence must be regenerated from clean immutable state.

does_not_authorize: any sample, partial, representative, or hash-equivalence replay as a cure
reuse of quarantined evidence for final MR-002 acceptance
non_retroactivity: This countersign documents and governs the present quarantine and reconciliation state. It does not retroactively authorize the 2026-07-13 cascade change or convert any unpreserved historical direction into a countersigned amendment.
amendment_rule: Any modification to the countersigned reconciliation artifact, its quarantine scope, its effective statuses, or its directed disposition requires a new artifact, a new hash, and an explicit countersign or supersession record. This countersign must remain separate from the Markdown artifact so that the bound artifact bytes remain unchanged.
